sections.heading: Monophthongs
sections.content:
12 pure vowels (short and long).
Examples:
/i:/ beat, seat
/i/ bit, sit
/e/ bed, hen
/æ/ cart, part
/a:/ cart, part
/ɒ/ pot, cork
/ɔ:/ port, cork
/u/ put, foot
/u:/ two, woo
/ʌ/ hut, cut
/ɜ:/ bird, herb
/ə/ akin, baker

sections.heading: Diphthongs
sections.content:
8 vowels involving a glide.
Examples:
/ei/ pay, again
/əu/ go, home
/ai/ rice, kite
/au/ cow, house
/ɔi/ toy, voice
/iə/ ear, here
/eə/ air, hair
/uə/ poor, tour
